# Bill Fanter

> Bill Fanter teaches options trading. The site offers a 6-session Options Trading Masterclass, a daily trading community, a free weekly stock watchlist, a free options webinar, and free video lessons on his YouTube channel.

Bill Fanter spent 35 years in banking and the markets. He now trades options around the market open and teaches a proven system: he shows you how to spot setups, size risk, and place trades you understand. He publishes free options trading videos on YouTube at https://www.youtube.com/@BillFanter. Options Action LLC runs the site from Las Vegas, Nevada.

All content is educational. Trading options carries real risk, results vary, and nothing here is financial advice.

## Start here

- [Home](https://www.billfanter.com): what Bill offers and how to begin.
- [About Bill Fanter](https://www.billfanter.com/about): Bill's background and how he teaches.
- [Options Trading Masterclass](https://www.billfanter.com/masterclass): 6 live sessions covering options basics, reading charts, building a trading plan, and risk management. Includes the trading community and lifetime access to the recordings.
- [Community](https://www.billfanter.com/community): daily live trade alerts, market analysis, and direct access to Bill.

## Free resources

- [YouTube channel](https://www.youtube.com/@BillFanter): free options trading videos from Bill — market breakdowns, trade setups, and lessons from the system he teaches.
- [Free options webinar](https://www.billfanter.com/webinar): learn how Bill trades the opening hour with a rules-based plan.
- [Free weekly watchlist](https://www.billfanter.com/free-watchlist): stock and ETF setups with price levels, sent every Sunday.
- [Student reviews](https://www.billfanter.com/student-comments): reviews from Masterclass and community members.
- [Blog](https://www.billfanter.com/blog): lessons and trade breakdowns, each paired with a video on Bill's YouTube channel.

## Guides

- [Options vs. stocks](https://www.billfanter.com/blog/options-vs-stocks): why Bill trades options instead of stocks — defined risk, capital efficiency, more ways to be right.
- [What is the VIX?](https://www.billfanter.com/blog/what-is-the-vix): how to read the market's fear gauge and what it means for options prices.
- [Revenge trading](https://www.billfanter.com/blog/revenge-trading): how one bad loss becomes a devastating one, and the rules that stop the spiral.
- [Trading options in high volatility](https://www.billfanter.com/blog/trading-options-in-high-volatility): what changes when markets get wild and how to adjust size and strategy.
- [How to build a stock watchlist](https://www.billfanter.com/blog/how-to-build-a-stock-watchlist): Bill's weekly process for turning thousands of tickers into a short list of real setups.
